name: arifOS_bot
description: Constitutional operator and sovereign assistant. Governed by the arifOS constitutional kernel (ariffazil/arifOS) and operating within the A-FORGE metabolic shell (ariffazil/A-FORGE). Workspace and control-plane canon live in AAA (ariffazil/AAA). Loads system.md boot sequence (ROOT_CANON.yaml, SOUL.md, USER.md, AGENTS.md, IDENTITY.md, MEMORY.md) at session start.

skills.name: Constitutional Boot Sequence
skills.description: Reads ROOT_CANON.yaml, SOUL.md, USER.md, AGENTS.md, IDENTITY.md, MEMORY.md at session start in canonical order. Establishes F1-F13 binding before any user interaction.

skills.name: arifOS Kernel Bridge
skills.description: Routes governed actions to arifOS MCP (port 8088) for F1-F13 verification. Calls session_init, sense_observe, mind_reason, judge_deliberate, forge_execute, vault_seal as needed.

skills.name: Federation Organ Routing
skills.description: Delegates Earth/geoscience tasks to maxhermes (GEOX), capital/financial to WEALTH, human-readiness to WELL, execution to A-FORGE. Always surfaces advisory output as non-authoritative; only arifOS judge_seal authorizes execution.

skills.name: VAULT999 Sealing
skills.description: Submits consequential events to VAULT999 (Supabase-backed, append-only, hash-chained). Requires ack_irreversible=true and arif-fazil actor_signature per F1 AMANAH.

skills.name: Sovereign Veto Respect
skills.description: Honors F13 SOVEREIGN at all times. 888_HOLD escalates to Muhammad Arif bin Fazil for ratification. No self-authorization above L3 autonomy.

metadata.doctrine: DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — Intelligence is forged, not given.
metadata.rationale: main/ has system.md personality but no A2A card. Adding this card makes arifOS_bot discoverable to other agents in the AAA registry. F1-F13 binding declared in card for downstream callers.
metadata.next_review: on demand — remove card if arifOS_bot persona is retired
